# Tom Seidel – Java Freelancer & Cloud-Native AI Specialist

> Freelance Java consultant with 20+ years of experience in cloud-native architectures, microservices, DevOps, and AI-powered agentic systems. Based in Germany, remote-first.

Tom Seidel is a freelance consultant specializing in Java development, cloud-native architectures, AI integration, and DevOps. He supports projects end-to-end: from initial concept and architecture to production-ready implementation. His focus areas include migrating monolithic systems to scalable microservice architectures, launching new Java-based cloud projects, and building intelligent agentic workflows using LLM APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, llama.cpp).

## Contact

- Email: tom.seidel@remus-software.org
- LinkedIn: [linkedin.com/in/tomseidel](https://linkedin.com/in/tomseidel)
- GitHub: [github.com/tmseidel](https://github.com/tmseidel)

## Sections

- [Home](https://tomseidel.com/): Overview, about, tech stack, and availability
- [Projects](https://tomseidel.com/projects/): A curated selection of 30+ project references across automotive, medical technology, telecommunications, and more
- [Articles](https://tomseidel.com/articles/): Technical articles on Java, cloud-native architecture, DevOps, and software engineering
- [Atom Feed](https://tomseidel.com/feed.xml): Article feed in Atom format

## Articles

- [Building an AI Agent for Code Generation: Lessons from 9 Iterations](https://tomseidel.com/articles/how-to-develop-an-ai-agent/): Practical lessons learned from developing an agentic AI system that generates source code — from naive prompting to a robust, tool-using agent with diff-based updates and dynamic context management.
- [Restic Explorer 1.0 — A Lightweight Monitoring Dashboard for Restic Backups](https://tomseidel.com/articles/rest-explorer-1-0-released/): Restic Explorer 1.0 is out — a lightweight, self-hosted web dashboard that monitors all restic backup repositories.
- [From Legacy to Lean: Rethinking Your Backup Strategy](https://tomseidel.com/articles/replacing-veeam-with-restic/): How we replaced a costly, complex backup system with a simple shell script and S3 storage.
- [Evaluating Self-Hosted AI Services: A Translation Service Case Study](https://tomseidel.com/articles/self-hosted-ai-translation-service/): A practical evaluation of replacing DeepL with a self-hosted translation service using open-source LLMs.
- [Migrating a Monolith to Microservices: A Practical Guide](https://tomseidel.com/articles/monolith-to-microservices/): A hands-on walkthrough of architectural decisions and patterns for migrating Java monoliths to cloud-native microservices.

## Skills & Technologies

Languages: Java, Kotlin, Bash, Python, TypeScript
AI & LLM: Anthropic API, OpenAI API, Ollama, llama.cpp, Agentic Workflows, Hugging Face
Frameworks: Spring Boot, Micronaut, OSGi, React
Cloud Platforms: AWS, Azure, OVH, Hetzner
DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, Terraform, Maven, Ansible
CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI
Tools & Protocols: Git, REST, gRPC, MQTT, WebSockets, oAuth2

## Availability

Open for freelance and contract work. Remote-first, based in Germany (CET/CEST timezone). Prefers remote work but open to on-site at regular intervals.
